children.text: to advise the Administrator on priority areas for survey, discovery, and opportunities for extramural collaboration and partnerships;
to assist the program in the development of a 5-year strategic plan for the fields of ocean, marine, and Great Lakes science, exploration, and discovery;
to annually review the quality and effectiveness of the proposal review process established under ; andsection 3403(a)(4) of this title1So in original. The word “and” probably should not appear.1
to identify market barriers to development or commercialization of novel ocean mapping, exploration, and characterization products, processes, and tools;
to identify best practices to improve data management, processing, storage, and archiving standards; and
to provide other assistance and advice as requested by the Administrator.

children.heading: Chapter 10 of title 5
children.label: b Chapter 10 of title 5
children.text: shall not apply to the Board appointed under subsection (a).Section 1013 of title 5

children.heading: Application with Outer Continental Shelf Lands Act
children.label: c Application with Outer Continental Shelf Lands Act
children.text: Nothing in this subchapter supersedes, or limits the authority of the Secretary of the Interior under the Outer Continental Shelf Lands Act ( et seq.).43 U.S.C. 1331
